mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.email, u.username, u.role, u.status, p.full_name, p.phone, p.bio, p.avatar_url, p.updated_at, u.created_at FROM tulip.user_profiles p JOIN tulip.users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tulip.user_profiles SET full_name = #{fullName}, phone = #{phone}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tulip.users SET username = #{username}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT password FROM tulip.users WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tulip.users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
